entries.name: HcrProcGetter
entries.code: HcrProcGetter = proc (libHandle: pointer; procName: cstring): pointer {.nimcall.}

entries.name: hcrRegisterProc
hcrGetProc
entries.code:
proc hcrGetProc(module: cstring; name: cstring): pointer {.compilerproc,
    exportc, dynlib, raises: [KeyError], tags: [], forbids: [].}
